metadata.name: Follow Up on an Uncorrected Violation

description: A code enforcement officer is following up on a citation for an overgrown lawn that has not been corrected by the deadline.

nodes.task_description: Identify the property with the outstanding violation.

expected_outcome.expected: The officer pulls up the case file for the property.

nodes.task_description: Perform a follow-up inspection to confirm the violation has not been corrected.

expected_outcome.expected: The officer visits the property and confirms the lawn is still overgrown.

nodes.task_description: Issue a second, more severe citation with a fine and a new deadline.

expected_outcome.expected: The officer issues a new citation with escalating penalties.
